fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of your company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies another line in which you can enter the name of the company that you are configuring.
You can enter up to 50 characters, numbers, and spaces.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies an address for the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city where the company that you are configuring is located.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Phone No. 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a second telephone number for the company that you are configuring.
You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.
Use a standard format to enter the telephone number so that it will look uniform on printed documents. The following are examples:

123 456 7890


12 34 56 78

fields.name: Telex No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the telex number of the company that you are configuring.
You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies fax number of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Giro No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the giro number of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Bank Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bank the company uses.

fields.name: Bank Branch No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the branch number of the bank that the company that you are configuring uses.

fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account number of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Payment Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment routing number of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Customs Permit No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customs permit number of the company that you are configuring.
You can enter a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Customs Permit Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the company received its customs permit.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number.

fields.name: Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the registration number of the company that you are configuring.
You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Telex Answer Back
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the company's telex answer back code.
You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the location to which items for the company should be shipped.
This name is used on printed documents, such as purchase orders, so enter it as you want it to appear.
You can enter a maximum of 50 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an additional part of the name of the location to which items for the company should be shipped.
This name is used on printed documents, for example, so enter it as you want it to appear.
You can enter a maximum of 50 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an additional part of the address to which items for the company should be shipped.
This address is used on printed documents, such as purchase orders, so enter it as you want it to appear.
You can enter a maximum of 50 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an additional part of the address to which items for the company should be shipped.
This address is used on printed documents, such as purchase orders, so enter it as you want it to appear.
You can enter a maximum of 50 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Contains the city of the address to which items for the company should be shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the contact person to whom items for the company should be shipped.
This name is used on printed documents, such as purchase orders, so enter it as you want it to appear
You can enter a maximum of 50 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the location code that corresponds to the company's ship-to address.
If the field contains a code, whenever the company orders items to be shipped to the company, the inventory location represented by the code will be used automatically.

fields.name: Picture
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been set up for the company, for example, a company logo.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the company's address. You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.
Use a standard format for county names so that they will look uniform on printed documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the post code of the shipping address of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the company's shipping address.
You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's web site.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the country/region of the company's shipping address.
You can enter a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters.
Use a standard format for county names so that they will look uniform on printed documents.

fields.name: IBAN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the international bank account number of the primary bank account of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: SWIFT Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the SWIFT code (international bank identifier code) of the primary bank of the company that you are configuring.

fields.name: Industrial Classification
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of industry that the company that you are configuring is.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the default responsibility center. This responsibility center will be used on all purchase and sales documents, if the user, customer or vendor have no default responsibility center.

fields.name: Check-Avail. Period Calc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a date formula that defines the length of the period after the planned shipment date on demand lines in which the system checks availability for the demand line in question. The setting in this field also applies to the Order Promising functionality.
This field interacts with the Check-Avail. Time Bucket field in which you define how frequently availability checks are performed during the period defined here.
For more information, see Check-Avail. Period Calc.

fields.name: Check-Avail. Time Bucket
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a time period that defines how frequently the system checks supply-demand events on the timeline to discover if the item on the demand line is available on its planned shipment date. The setting in this field also applies to the Order Promising functionality.
If you select Week, for example, then the program checks for availability based on demand-supply events accumulated during one week at a time. At the end of each week, the system checks if the demand line can be covered. If the sum quantity in one of the time buckets, within the Check-Avail. Period Calc. period, can cover the demand, then no stockout warning is displayed.
For more information, see Check-Avail. Time Bucket.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the base calendar that you want to assign to your company.

fields.name: Cal. Convergence Time Frame
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how dates based on calendar and calendar-related documents, such as sales, purchase, production and transfer orders, are calculated..
The field shows the maximum timespan over which a coinciding date will be searched for in the currently used calendars.
The field has a default value of one year, but you can change this.

fields.name: Package File Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the configuration package that you have created.

fields.name: Package Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the configuration package.

fields.name: Language ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language ID of the configuration package.

fields.name: Product Version
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version of Microsoft Dynamics NAV upon which you are basing your configuration of a company.
You can enter up to 50 characters, number and spaces.

fields.name: Package Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the package that contains the configuration information.

fields.name: Your Profile Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profile code for your configuration solution and package.
